productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Graphic Black Belt
description: Time to get bold and look beautiful with this belt from lino perros. An all-time favourite accessory and an integral part of dressing, this Leatherette belt helps to secure a pair of jeans or work as a styling detail to tops and trousers and is all set to heighten your style quotient, adding zing to your attire. Length Freesize Made of Leatherette for durability and style Embossed design for enhanced style Tang clasp and metal buckle to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Holes to customise fit Fixed loop and broad base to sit snug on the waist Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth to remove dust
